title: No Hitting Villagers
description: Adds a toggle to prevent you from harming villagers with a left-click attack
body:
Simple Mod that disables the Players Hit-Attack on Villagers.

By default the Attack is disabled but can be turned back on by pressing the 'P'-Key. This Keybind can be remapped.
![Key Mapping in the Key Binds tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f7fc37f9f96549a2d772ef81da5f2ed9d5c6d76_0.webp)
